reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
일단 진짜 귀여워요!! 주인 맘에도 쏙!
평소 노즈워크를 좋아하는 강아지라면
정말 잘 가지고 놀 장난감이에요🐶

기존에 당근만 있는 노즈워크 장난감이 있었는데
이건 채소가 다양해서 훨씬 좋아요!!!
옥수수, 감자, 고구마에 맛있는 간식이 쏘옥 
시간 가는 줄 모르고 놀더라고요🧡

외출할 때, 심심해 할 때 간식 넣어주면 
딱일 거 같아요! 완전 만족스러워요👍🏻
reviews.content_en:
It's seriously so cute!! The owner loves it too!
If your dog usually enjoys nose work games,
this is a really great toy to play with 🐶

I used to have a nose work toy with just carrots,
but this one is so much better with a variety of vegetables!!!
Corn, potatoes, sweet potatoes with yummy treats tucked inside
My pup played and lost track of time 🧡

I think it'll be perfect for car rides or when they're bored—just add some treats!
I'm completely satisfied with this! 👍🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 한참동안 놀 수 있을 것 같아서 주문했는데 받자마자 정말 신나게 놀고 재미있어해서 뿌듯했어요ㅎㅎ 아직 아가들이라서 어떻게 하는지 잘 모르는 것 같지만 끝까지 오래 놀아서 좋았어요. 잘 안 찢어질 것 같은 퀄리티고, 디자인도 엄청 귀여워요ㅎㅎ  어떤건 바스락 소리 나고 어떤건 삑삑이 소리 나서 다양하게 재미있게 놀 수 있으니 좋아요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I ordered it thinking my pups would be able to play with it for a long time, and I was so happy seeing them have so much fun right away! hehe They're still babies so they don't quite understand how it works yet, but they played with it for ages which was great. The quality feels durable and won't tear easily, and the design is super cute too hehe Some parts make a crinkly sound and some make a squeaky sound so there's lots of variety to keep them entertained hehe

reviews.name: 부****
reviews.content:
초토화는 시간문제!
역시 바잇미, 디테일에 강하고 실용성 갑 입니다.
물론 귀여움은 말할 것도 없지요.
reviews.content_en:
Total destruction is only a matter of time!
BITE ME really delivers on the details and practicality.
Of course, the cuteness is unquestionable.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 밭 구멍에 쏙! 옥수수, 고구마 껍질 속에도 쏙쏙! 감자 옆구리에도 쏙! 까까 숨길 곳도 많고 숨은 까까도 찾느라 더 오래 가지고 놀아요 !! 삑삑이, 바스락 다 되는 장난감 👍🏻 장난감도 너무 귀엽고ㅜㅜ 🍠🥔🌽 바닥에는 미끄럼방지패드까쥐~
reviews.content_en: Fits perfectly in the field holes! Tucked into the corn and sweet potato peels too! Treats hide in the potato sides too! Lots of hiding spots for the snacks and they spend even more time playing searching for hidden treats!! Squeakers and crinkles—this toy has it all 👍🏻 The toy itself is so adorable ㅜㅜ 🍠🥔🌽 And the bottom has a non-slip pad too~

reviews.name: 버터언니
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡
한마디로 넘 감동적이었습니다..
이렇게 길게 할 줄 모르고 영상 찍기 시작한거였는데
예상했던 것보다 훠얼씬 길게 오래가지고 놀아줘서 너무 감동적 ㅎㅎ
감자 쏙쏙 뽑아먹을때가 특히 귀여워요 >//< 주인 닮아서 고구마보단 감자파인가봐요
reviews.content_en:
🧡Honest Employee Review🧡
To sum it up, I was so touched...
I didn't expect to film for this long when I started recording
but it lasted way longer than I expected and I was so impressed hehe
It's especially cute when they pop out the potatoes and munch on them >//< They must be a potato fan like their owner—more potato than sweet potato hehe

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
사진으로 보시다시피 ㅎㅎㅎ엄청 좋아하네요
역시 바잇미 제품은 믿고 구매합니다 더좋은 제품 많이많이 부탁드립니다
reviews.content_en:
As you can see in the photos hehehe they absolutely love it
I always trust and buy BITE ME products—please keep making even better products!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
작년 초에 애착인형 옥수수 망가져서 같은거 재구매후 오랜만에 맘에 들고 좋아할 것 같은 장난감 발견해서 구매하게 되었어요
역시나 10살인 저희애 너무 좋아해요 돈 하나도 안아까운 장난감 입니다
reviews.content_en:
Our attachment toy corn broke early last year, so after repurchasing the same one, I discovered this toy that I liked and thought they'd enjoy, so I got it
Sure enough, my 10-year-old loves it so much! It's a toy that's totally worth the money.

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 진짜 울 갱얼쥐 환장해요 농작물들 캐내고 껍질 벗기고 난리나요 이거 꺼내기만 하면 벌떡 일어남ㅠㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 노즈워크 난이도도 꽤 있어서 진짜 만족해여
reviews.content_en: My pup absolutely goes crazy for this! They're digging up the crops, peeling the shells, going wild! They jump right up the moment I pull this out ㅠㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ The nose work difficulty level is pretty high too, so I'm really satisfied

reviews.name: 호두언니
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡 
안녕하세요! 노즈워크 러버 호두 언니에요~ 사실 이제까지 사준 노즈워크 장난감들은 갖고놀면 3초컷이라 금방 다른 장난감을 찾아 나섰는데 이번  농장 타이쿤 장난감은 간식을 구멍속에도 넣고 구황작물 껍질속에도 넣어주니까 정신을 못차리더라구요👍👍 노즈워크가 쉬운 난이도는 아니여서 생각보다 오랜시간 동안 간식 찾으면서 갖고 놀았어요. 옥구감 중에 최애는 입에 쏙 들어가는 옥수수 장난감이였어요🌽껍질만 쏙 벗긴채 옥수수를 물고 다니는 호두가 또 너무 귀엽더라구요~ 길게하는 노즈워크 장난감을 찾고 계신다면 추천해요👏👏
reviews.content_en:
🧡Honest Employee Review🧡
Hi! I'm Walnut noona, a nose work game lover~ Honestly, the nose work toys I've given her before were done in 3 seconds, so she'd quickly move on to another toy, but with this farm tycoon toy, when I hide treats in the holes and inside the crop peels, she just can't focus on anything else 👍👍 Since the nose work isn't easy difficulty, she played with it longer than expected searching for treats. My favorite among the corn, potato, and sweet potato is the corn toy that fits perfectly in her mouth 🌽 Watching Walnut carry the corn with just the peel peeled off is so adorable~ If you're looking for a nose work toy that keeps them entertained for a long time, I'd recommend it! 👏👏

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
하나하나 간식을 숨겨줄 수 있어서 오래 가지고 놀아요
엄청 재미있어해요
reviews.content_en:
Since you can hide treats one by one, they play with it for a long time
They have so much fun with it!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
아니아니 이렇게 깜찍하고 사랑스러운 노즈워크 장난감을 만들면 또 안 살 수가 없자나요ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ우리 망뭉이 바로 농부로 만들어버렸습니다^^
농작물들을 거의 아작냈어요퓨ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ
너무너무 좋아하고 잘 가지고 놀아요 간식을 안 넣어줘도 혼자서 계속 수확합니다ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
뿌듯하네요 귀여운 짜식ㅎ
reviews.content_en: No no, how can I not buy it when they make such an adorable and lovely nose work toy like this ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ We turned our Mangmung into a farmer right away ^^ The crops are almost all destroyed ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ She loves it so much and plays with it well. Even without treats, she keeps harvesting by herself ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ So satisfying, what a cute little thing ㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 다른 브랜드 당근밭 사려고 하던 중에 바잇미 인스타보고 오매불망 기다리다가 샀어요. 너무 귀엽고 우리 막내 맘에도 쏙 드나봐요. 처음엔 조금씩 도와줘야 했는데 이젠 뭐 발길질 한번에 농작물 두개씩 뽑네요. 만족스러워요 너무 잘 산듯^^
reviews.content_en: I was thinking about buying another brand's carrot patch when I saw BITE ME on Instagram and waited forever before buying. It's so cute and our youngest loves it too. At first I had to help a little, but now with one kick she pulls out two crops at a time. Really satisfied, feels like I bought it well ^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
노즈워크만 해주고 나가면 엄마가 나가든말든 쳐다도안보는 애기를 위해 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ새로운 노즈워크를 사줬어여
출시때부터 살까말까했는데 받아보니 퀄리티 넘 좋구 인형 9개도 전부 귀엽고 좋아요 왜 진즉 안샀을까 ㅋㅋㅋ 
간식넣기도 편하고 한참갖고 놀아서 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: For our baby who doesn't even look at us whether mom leaves or not when we just do nose work before going out ㅋㅋㅋㅋ I bought a new nose work toy. I was on the fence about it since launch, but when I received it the quality is amazing and all 9 plushies are adorable and great. Why didn't I buy this sooner ㅋㅋㅋ It's easy to hide treats in and she plays with it for a long time, which is great ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 재밌게 잘놀아요🥰 매트처럼 넓게 펼치지 않아도 되어서 좋아요! 노즈워크 끝나면 장난감으로 알차게 가지고놀구요😍 바스락바스락 재밌게 잘놀고 있는거 보면 잘샀다 싶네용💕
reviews.content_en: She plays with it so much fun 🥰 I like that it doesn't have to spread out wide like a mat! After nose work she plays with it well as a toy 😍 Seeing her enjoy playing with the crinkly sounds makes me think I made a great purchase 💕

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 너무너무 귀여워요! 수확물 안에도 간식을 숨길 수 있어서 진짜 오래 놀 수 있어요 ! 장난감에 그닥 관심이 없는 아이들인데 한참 찾고 노네요🥹
reviews.content_en: So so cute! You can hide treats inside the harvest items too so she can really play for a long time! These are kids who don't usually care much about toys but they're really searching and playing with this one 🥹

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
정말 미친듯이 합니다ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ그리고 농작물 하나하나 바스락 삑삑이 있어서 하나씩고 갖고 놀아여ㅋㅋ던쟈달라구~
 침 말리느라 배란다에 놓으면 어느샌가 하나씩 주워어ㅏ서 바스락 거리고 있답니다.
웬만한 노즈워크는 금방 해버리는데 이건 시간도 많이 걸려서 미친듯이 하고 물 한컵 뚝딱입니다ㅋㅋ 강추!!
reviews.content_en: She's absolutely crazy about it ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ And each crop has a crinkle and squeaker so she plays with them one by one ㅋㅋ 'Give me more!' She's asking~ If I put it on the veranda while managing the drool, before I know it she's picked them up one by one and is crinkling away. She finishes most nose work pretty quick, but this one takes a long time so she goes crazy with it and drinks a whole cup of water ㅋㅋ Highly recommend!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
푸들 / 3살 / 4.5kg 
강아지가 평소에도 조금 활발한 편이긴 한데, 생각보다 더 재밌게 가지고 놀아서 설 선물로 사준게 넘 뿌듯해요!!ㅠ
인형은 무척이나 좋아하는데 노즈워크는 매트 사줬을때 몇번 안했어서 살지말지 고민 많이했어요. 고구마/옥수수/감자 인형이 같이 딸려오니까 괜찮겠지하고 샀는데, 노즈워크도 엄청 잘하네요... 감격 ㅠ_ㅠ 강아지도 신나는지 눈물 줄줄 흘리면서 열심히해요..*^_^* 노즈워크 끝나고는 인형 던지기 놀이 해달라하네용
이거 하고나서 우리 강아지 얼굴 보기가 힘들어졌어용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Poodle / 3 years old / 4.5kg My pup is usually pretty active, but she plays with this even more fun than expected so I'm so proud I got it as a Seollal gift!! ㅠ She really loves the plushies, but when I gave her a mat nose work toy she only did it a few times so I was really worried about buying this. I thought it would be okay since it comes with sweet potato/corn/potato plushies, but she does the nose work amazingly too... I'm touched ㅠ_ㅠ My pup is so excited she's doing it hard with tears streaming down her face..*^_^* After nose work she's asking me to play fetch with the plushies. It's hard to see my pup's face these days ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
후...너무 좋아해서 정해진 시간에만 꺼내줘요ㅎㅎㅎ 오자마자 첫날에 고구마에 구멍이 났구요...ㅎㅎ

진짜 좋아해요 꼭 사주세요ㅎㅎ

간식 숨기기도 좋고ㅎ 사이즈가 딱 물고 다니기 좋아서 그때 그때 최애가 바뀌고 있어요ㅎ
reviews.content_en: Phew... She loves it so much I only take it out at set times ㅎㅎㅎ On the first day right after getting it, the sweet potato got a hole in it ㅎㅎ I really love it, you should definitely buy it ㅎㅎ It's great for hiding treats ㅎ The size is perfect for carrying around so her favorite changes from time to time ㅎ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 앗 이거이거 요물!! 왜이제 샀나몰라요ㅋㅋ 아니 옥수수랑 고구마랑 옷이 벗겨지다니ㅋㅋㅋ 내가 정리할일이 많지만^^; 울애기 갖고놀게 더 많아졌네요 노즈워크 초보댕댕이라 옥수수안에 넣어둔건 못꺼내먹더라구여🥹 거의 입에 대줬다능.. 좀더 발전하겠죠? 울애기 엄마가 노즈워크에 너무 무심했어ㅠ 이런장난감 많이 나왔면 좋겠어요 🩵
reviews.content_en: Oh this this is a must-have!! Why did I buy this just now ㅋㅋ Wait, the corn and sweet potato's clothes are coming off ㅋㅋㅋ I have a lot to clean up ^^; but my baby has even more toys to play with now. She's a nose work beginner so she couldn't get the treats I hid inside the corn 🥹 I basically had to put it in her mouth... She'll get better at it, right? My baby's mom wasn't very interested in nose work ㅠ I hope more toys like this come out 🩵

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 처음에 좀 어려워해서 어디다가 넣었는지 보여주니깐 잘해요~농사 시켜도되겠어요~
reviews.content_en: At first she had a bit of trouble, but once I showed her where I hid them she does well~ I could even have her do farming~

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 워낙에 공놀이하는걸 좋아해서 노즈워크 시키고자 주문했습니다. 생각보다 더 퀄리티가 좋네요! 옥수수와 고구마 껍질을 바스락하게 만든것도 너무좋네요!
reviews.content_en: Since my pup loves playing with balls so much, I ordered this for nose work games. The quality is even better than I expected! I love how the corn and sweet potato skins are made to crinkle so nicely!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요...
이건 토리 최애이기도 한데, 저의 최애에요
장난감 숨겨줄때마다 넘 귀엽고
구멍에다가 다른 장난감 꽂아주기도 좋네요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute... 😭 This is Tori's favorite toy, and honestly it's my favorite too. Every time I hide toys in it, it's so adorable, and it's great being able to stick other toys in the holes too lol

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 우연히 바잇미의 노즈워크 장난감을 사서 잘 노는 우리 강아지들을 보고 또 시켜봤어요 이번이 4번짼데 이러다 종류별로 다 사게 생겼습니다ㅋㅋㅋ간식을 안 넣었는데도 너무 잘 갖고 노니까 사줄 맛이 제대로 납니다 삑삑이를 굉장히 좋아하는데 죄다 삑삑소리가 나니까 흥분이 가라앉지 않네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ제가 다 만족스러워요 장난감 신상 많이 올려주세요!!!💕💕
reviews.content_en: I accidentally bought a BITE ME nose work toy and saw how well our pups played with it, so I tried this one too. This is already my 4th purchase, and at this rate I'm gonna end up buying all the different types lol lol lol Even without treats inside, they play with it so well that it's totally worth buying! My dogs love squeaky toys, and since they all have squeakers, the excitement never dies down lol lol lol lol I'm completely satisfied. Please release more new toy designs!!! 💕💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 11살 강아지라 장난감 사줘도 관심 없는데 이건 너므 좋아해요..감사합니다 냄새 맡는거 좋아하는 아이들이라면 다 좋아할거 같아요!
reviews.content_en: My dog is 11 years old and usually doesn't care about toys, but this one she loves so much... Thank you! I think any dog that likes to sniff will love this!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 저희집 강아지가 물고빨고 합니다 엄청 좋아해서 뿌듯하네용 ㅎㅎ 그 당근 노즈워크보다 간식 넣을곳도 많아서 좋아용ㅋㅋ 저희집 농부입니다~!
reviews.content_en: Our pup chews and licks it all the time. It's so satisfying watching how much she loves it! hehe It has more spots to hide treats than that carrot nose work toy, so that's a bonus lol lol We're basically farmers in our house~!

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content:
돈이 아깝지 않네요~^^ 
퀄리티 좋고 요리조리 간식이나 사료 숨겨서 노즈워크 하기에 넘 구성이 다양하고 좋아요👍 이전에 이런류의 제품들이 시중에 많이 판매해서 구입한적 있었는데… 너무 바느질 허접하고 디자인도 별로고, 무엇보다 간식 숨기는 곳이 구멍에만 너무 한정적으로 있어서 반품! 한동안 반품의 실망을 겪은지라… 다시 이런류의 제품 구입할 마음 1도 없었는데 바잇미의 본제품 보고 바로 구매버튼 눌렀습니다 ㅎ ㅎ
여러분~ 이거 구입하시면 후회 안합니다^^ 절대!!!
reviews.content_en: Money well spent~^^ The quality is great and it's so versatile for nose work with treats or kibble hidden everywhere! I've bought similar products before from other brands, but the stitching was terrible, the design wasn't great, and worst of all the treat-hiding spots were super limited to just holes, so I returned it! After being disappointed by that return for a while, I had zero interest in buying this type of product again... but when I saw BITE ME's actual product, I hit the buy button right away lol lol You guys, you won't regret buying this^^ Absolutely!!!

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
평소에 활동량은 많은데 집에서는 심심해하는 시간이 많아서 노즈워크 장난감을 찾고 있었어요.
간식 숨겨주면서 놀 수 있는 제품을 찾다가 바잇미 농장타이쿤 노즈워크 장난감을 보고 디자인이 너무 귀여워서 바로 관심이 갔어요 :)

특히 옥수수, 감자, 고구마 같은 농장 컨셉이라 눈으로 보기에도 재미있고, 단순한 장난감이 아니라 후각 활동까지 할 수 있다는 점이 마음에 들었어요.

직접 사용해보니 곳곳에 간식을 숨길 수 있는 구조라서 반려견이 코를 열심히 쓰면서 찾는 모습이 너무 귀엽더라구요 😂
한 번 시작하면 집중해서 찾느라 시간 가는 줄 모르고 놀아서, 혼자 있는 시간에도 지루해하지 않을 것 같아요.

특히 단순히 물어뜯는 장난감이 아니라 두뇌활동 + 스트레스 해소까지 같이 되는 점이 정말 만족스러웠어요.

소재도 부드럽고 구성품이 다양해서 매번 숨기는 위치를 바꿔주면 새로운 놀이처럼 활용할 수 있어서 활용도가 높은 점도 좋았어요.

다만 처음에는 사용법을 잘 몰라서 살짝 헤매는 모습이 있었는데, 몇 번 해보니까 금방 익숙해져서 더 적극적으로 놀더라구요!

전체적으로 디자인, 재미, 활용도까지 다 잡은 노즈워크 장난감이라 꾸준히 사용해보고 싶은 제품이에요 :)
reviews.content_en:
My pup is usually very active but gets bored a lot at home, so I was looking for a nose work toy. I was searching for a product where she could hide treats and play, and then I saw the BITE ME Farm Tycoon Nose Work Toy and I was immediately interested because the design is so cute :)

I especially loved that it has a farm concept with corn, potatoes, and sweet potatoes, so it's fun just to look at, and it's not just a simple toy but also allows for olfactory activities.

When I actually used it, I realized treats can be hidden in various spots, and watching my pup sniff and search carefully was so cute 😂 Once she starts, she concentrates on finding treats and loses track of time, so I don't think she'll be bored even when she's alone.

What really satisfied me was that it's not just a toy to chew on—it combines mental stimulation and stress relief at the same time.

The material is soft and there are lots of components, so I can change where I hide the treats each time and it feels like a new game every time, which is great for reusability.

At first she seemed a bit confused about how to use it, but after trying it a few times she got the hang of it and started playing more actively!

Overall, it's a nose work toy that nails design, fun, and usability, so I want to keep using it regularly :)

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
1️⃣ 오랫동안 가지고 놀 수 있다
보통 노즈워크 장난감은 보호자가 외출을 하거나 비가 와서 긴 산책을 못 할때 사용하는데요.
"바잇미 농장타이쿤 노즈워크"는 옥수수🌽 감자🥔 고구마🍠가 무려 9개나 있고, 각각의 농작물로도 개별 노즈워크가 가능해서 아주 오랜시간 장난감에 집중할 수 있어요!

2️⃣ 여러 종류의 장난감으로 활용가능하다
노즈워크 장난감이라고 해서 노즈워크만 가능한게 아니에요‼️
"바잇미 농장타이쿤 노즈워크"는 농작물에서 바스락 소리도 나고 삑삑 소리도 나기 때문에 터그놀이와 던지기 놀이도 가능하답니다🔥

3️⃣ 바닥에 미끄럼 방지 패드가 있다
노즈워크 장난감에 집중을 하다보면 코로 이쪽 끝에서 저쪽 끝까지 밀고 다니는거 저희 강아지만 그런거 아니죠〰️?!!
"바잇미 농장타이쿤 노즈워크"는 미끄럼 방지 패드가 있어서 힘으로 밀어도 움직이지 않아요!

우리 함께 귀여운 구황작물 수확하러 가요🚜
오늘도 열심히 농사짓기 완료👩‍🌾
reviews.content_en:
1️⃣ Can play with it for a long time
Nose work toys are usually used when the owner goes out or when it rains and you can't take a long walk.
With "BITE ME Farm Tycoon Nose Work," there are a whopping 9 pieces of corn🌽 potatoes🥔 and sweet potatoes🍠, and each crop can be used for individual nose work sessions, so your dog can concentrate on the toy for a very long time!

2️⃣ Can be used as multiple types of toys
Just because it's a nose work toy doesn't mean it can only be used for nose work!‼️
"BITE ME Farm Tycoon Nose Work" has crinkly sounds from the crops and also squeaker sounds, so it's also great for tug play and fetch games🔥

3️⃣ Has non-slip pads on the bottom
When a dog focuses on nose work, it pushes the toy from one end to the other with its snout—I'm not the only one experiencing this, right〰️?!!
"BITE ME Farm Tycoon Nose Work" has non-slip pads, so it doesn't move even when pushed hard!

Let's go harvest cute relief crops together🚜
Completed today's farm work👩‍🌾

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
일단 생긴게 하나하나 다 너무 귀여워서 제가 들고 다니고 싶은데
저희집 강쥐가 너무너무 좋아해요🍠🥔🌽🐶🤍
고굼쓰 감자쓰 옥수쓰 귀여운건 알고 있었는데
자수로 들어간 지렁쓰랑 애벌레쓰도 디테일 걍 미쳤어요

진짜 너무너무 귀여워요 너무너무 귀여운데
귀엽기만한데서 끝이 아니라 구성도 너무 좋아요
여기저기에 냠냠을 숨길 수 있고
심는 정도에 따라서 난이도 조절도 가능한 것 같아요
저희집 강쥐는 아직 3개월 정도 이지만 근육형이라 너무 헐렁하지는
않을 정도로만 뽑았는데도 곧잘 가지고 놀아요ㅎㅎ🥹🤍

그리고 9칸 모두 컨텐츠라 하나 뽑고 놀고 끝 이게 아니라
[하나 뽑기 > 심어둔 사료 먹기 > 인형 가지고 놀기 > 인형 안에 사료 먹기 > 인형 가지고 놀기] 이걸 아홉번 반복할 수 있어서 강쥐가 바쁘게 놀 수 있어요🐶💨

현업으로 혼자 있게되는 시간이 어쩔 수 없이 생기다보니 특히 노즈워크류 장난감에 관심이 많은데 잘 가지고 놀던 바잇미 노즈워크 플레이북이 거의 마지막 잎새 수준으로 혹사 당하고 있던 차에 이런 신상이 나와서 너무너무 기쁩니다⸝⸝ʚ̴̶̷̆ ̯ʚ̴̶̷̆⸝⸝ 

저도 페퍼도 너무나 만족하는 소비..
혹시 고민하는 분들이 계시다면 고민은 배송을 늦출뿐…🍠🌽🥔
reviews.content_en:
First of all, each piece is so cute that I want to carry them around myself, but my pup absolutely loves them 🍠🥔🌽🐶🤍 I already knew the sweet potato, potato, and corn were cute, but the embroidered worm and caterpillar details are just insane. They're seriously so adorable, and not only are they adorable but the structure is amazing too. You can hide snacks all over the place, and you can adjust the difficulty level depending on how firmly you place them. My pup is only about 3 months old but is pretty muscular, so even though I pulled them out just enough that they're not too loose, she still plays with them great hehe 🥹🤍

And since all 9 slots have content, it's not just "pull out one toy and you're done." It's more like [pull one out > eat the hidden kibble > play with the toy > eat the kibble inside the toy > play with the toy] repeated nine times, so my pup stays busy playing 🐶💨

Since my work schedule means she has to be alone sometimes, I'm especially interested in nose work toys. My BITE ME Playbook nose work toy that she loved playing with was getting absolutely destroyed to the point it was nearly falling apart, so when this new product came out I was beyond thrilled ⸝⸝ʚ̴̶̷̆ ̯ʚ̴̶̷̆⸝⸝

Both Pepper and I are so satisfied with this purchase... If anyone is on the fence, hesitation only delays shipping... 🍠🌽🥔

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 일단 귀여워서 제가 만족하고요 컴팩트한 사이즈라 물고 다니는 거 좋아하는 애기가 잘 물고 다닙니다. 노즈워크는 웬만한 어려운 거 잘하던 친구라 그런지 하면 할수록 빨라지네요 2중으로 껍데기에도 넣을 수 있어서 노즈워크 시간이 더 늘어나는 건 큰 장점! 그리고 바닥에 미끄럼방지 되어있는게..진짜 짱..이게 디테일 장인이에요..가격대비 퀄리티가 좋습니다
reviews.content_en: First of all, I'm satisfied just because it's so cute, and since my pup likes carrying things in her mouth, she loves carrying this compact-sized toy around. For nose work, since she's already good at harder puzzles, she gets faster the more she does it. The double-shell design with treats hidden in the outer shell too really extends the nose work playtime, which is a huge advantage! And the non-slip pads on the bottom are honestly amazing... this is craftsmanship at its finest... The quality is great for the price.

reviews.name: 상****
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡
노즈워크 할 수 있는 공간이 다양해서 넣고서 까먹인 인간 대신 강아지가 킁킁 찾아줍니다~~
감자 옆에 주머니에도 넣고, 고구마 옥수수 옷 안에도 넣고, 밭안에도 넣으니까 넣은 사람도 잊을 정도로 공간이 무한 확장인데 강아지도 여기저기 찾느라 그동안 해봤던 다른 노즈워크 장난감의 2배 정도 시간을 쓰는 거 같아요! 둘째 강지는 노즈워크 초보라서 잘 못하는데 그럴때는 그냥 밭안에만 넣어주니까 잘 하더라구요! 순서대로 노즈워크 실력 올려주고 싶다면 팜즈워크 추천합니당🧡
reviews.content_en:
🧡Honest Dog Parent Review🧡
There are so many different spots for nosework that my dog sniffs around to find treats while I forget where I hid them~~
I put treats in the pockets next to the potato, inside the corn and sweet potato clothes, and in the field too—the space is infinitely expandable to the point where even I forget what I put where! My dog spends about 2x the time searching compared to other nosework toys we've tried before! My second pup is a nosework beginner so she struggles at first, but when I just put treats in the field part, she does great! If you want to level up your dog's nosework skills progressively, I highly recommend FARMZWORK 🧡

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 넘나 좋아하는 아이라 나오자마자 얼른 구매했네요😁
농장타이쿤과 비슷한 당근밭이 있어서 그것도 참 좋아하는데
요건 간식 숨기는 곳들이 많아서 더 오래 즐길수 있답니다ㅋㅋ작물 하나하나 넘나 귀엽고 삑삑이에 껍질들은 바스락바스락~
중대형견인 아이인지라 구멍들이 작고작지만 그래도 열심히 찾아 먹는 모습을 보니 성공적!! 요런거 많이 만들어주세요!!!😀
reviews.content_en:
My pup loves nosework SO much, so I bought this right away when it came out😁
It has a carrot patch similar to Farm Tycoon which is really fun, but this one has even more spots to hide treats so you can enjoy it longer hehe. Each crop is so adorable and the crinkly sounds and crunchy textures are amazing~
Since my dog is a medium/large breed, the holes are pretty small but she still works hard to find and eat the treats—success! Please make more of these!!!😀

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
첫주문 웰컴딜로 저렴하게 구매했어요~
저희아가 장난감 킬러인데 특히 새 장난감은 환장해요 ㅎㅎ
이번에도 성공적인 구매였어요 ㅎㅎ
집에 종류별로 딸기농장,당근농장,토마토,호박농장 다있는데 
이제 날씨도 쌀쌀하구 가을이니 구황작물로 구매했는데
저도 강아지도 대만족이예요~
바스락,삑삑이, 그리구 옥수수랑 고구마는 껍질도 벗겨지는데 그안에 간식숨겨서 노즈워크도 가능!!
강아지도 즐겁지만 구경하는 저도 넘 재밌어요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
Got it on a great first-order welcome deal~
My pup is a toy destroyer, especially with new toys haha
This purchase was another success! We have strawberry field, carrot field, tomato, and pumpkin field at home, but since the weather's getting cooler and it's fall, I bought this autumn harvest edition and both my pup and I are super satisfied~
The crinkly and squeaky sounds are great, and the corn and sweet potato have removable peels with treats hidden inside for nosework too!!
It's fun for my pup but honestly watching her play with it is so entertaining for me too hehehe

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 애벌레 디테일도 너무 귀엽고 생각보다 농작물 넣은 구멍이 깊어서 난이도 조절도 가능한 것 같아요. 저희 두부는 처음에 농작물을 조금 깊게 넣어줬더니 어려워 해서 조금 빼주니 잘 하더라고요! 일단 노즈워크도 할 수 있고 농작물이 9개가 있어서 농작물 자체만으로도 공놀이 할 수 있어서 좋아요! 처음 줘보니 새장난감 자체만으로도 좋은데 간식도 숨겨줘서 정신을 못 차립니다ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The caterpillar details are so cute and the holes for the crops are deeper than I expected, so you can adjust the difficulty level. When I first gave it to my pup Tofu with the crops placed deeply, she found it hard, but when I pulled them up a bit she did great! Plus you can do nosework and there are 9 different crops so you can even play fetch just with the crops themselves—that's awesome! When I first gave it to her, just the new toy alone was great, but then I hid treats in it too and now she can't focus on anything else hahaha

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 초반에 쉬운거 하나만 사서 계속 사용했었는데 넘 쉽게하고 금방 다 찾아먹드라구요~ 다른것도 다 비슷할거라고 생각하고 다른거 사줄 생각 안하고 있었는데 난이도도 높다하고 영상이랑 리뷰 보니깐 꽤 오래가지고 논다고 해서 구매했어요!! 
감자는 옆구리에 넣고 옥수수랑 고구마는 부스럭소리나는 사이에도 넣을 수 있어서 좋은거 같아요~ 인형 속에 있는 간식 먹다가 인형가지고 놀다가 또 인형빼서 간식 빼먹고 노는데 시간이 아주 잘갈꺼 같아용~~ 다 같은 노즈워크가 아니라 색다른거라 애들도 안지겨워 할거 같네요!! 그리고 그냥 던져주는 인형이나 혼자가지고 노는 인형으로도 좋을꺼 같아요~! 
마지막으로 캐릭터랑 밭이랑 다 너무 귀엽드라구요!!! ㅎㅎ 10월에 출산예정인데 아가한테 뺏기는건 아닐까 걱정이네요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
At the beginning of nosework I only bought an easy puzzle and my pup solved it so quickly and found all the treats fast~ I thought everything else would be the same so I wasn't planning to buy another one, but people said this one has a higher difficulty level and from videos and reviews I saw it keeps dogs entertained for way longer, so I decided to get it!!
I put treats in the side pockets of the potato and can hide them inside the crinkly corn and sweet potato too, which is awesome~ She eats treats from inside the stuffed toy, plays with the toy itself, then pulls out the toy to find more treats and plays some more—time will fly by~~ It's not just another basic nosework toy, it's something different so the pups won't get bored! And it also works great as just a regular plush toy to throw or for them to play with alone~!
And honestly the character and field are both SO adorable!!! hehe I'm due in October and I'm worried my baby might steal this from my pup hahahaha

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 감자 옥수수 고구마가 왜이렇게 튼실하죠? 올해 농사가 잘된것 같아요 ദ്ദിㆁᴗㆁ✿) 아주 저희 멍멍이가 밭을 쑥대밭으로 만들고 그것도 모자라 밭안에 발을 푹푹 담그고 노네요 ㅋㅋㅋ 노즈워크를 하지않아도 인형만 가지고 놀아도 너무 재미있네요 최고에요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Why are the potatoes, corn, and sweet potatoes so sturdy? Looks like this year's harvest was great ദ്ദിㆁᴗㆁ✿) My pup has completely torn up the field and on top of that is stomping through it with her paws hahaha It's so fun even without doing nosework—she just plays with the toy itself and that's enough. This is the best haha

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
바잇미 농장타이쿤 노즈워크 장난감 🐶🌽🥔

부드러운 극세사 벨벳 같은 소재라 촉감이 좋아요. 장난감 안에 바스락 소리 나는 감자·고구마·옥수수 모양 인형이 들어 있어서 강아지가 더 흥미를 보여요 😊

간식 숨길 수 있는 공간이 여러 군데라 단순히 한 번 찾고 끝나는 구조가 아니에요. 여기저기 코로 탐색하면서 꺼내 먹느라 오래 집중해요 🧠✨

혼자 있는 시간에 주면 지루함 해소에도 도움이 되고, 노즈워크 놀이로 에너지 분산도 잘 되는 느낌이에요. 아이가 잘 가지고 놀아서 만족도 높아요!
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Farm Tycoon Nosework Toy 🐶🌽🥔

The soft microfiber velvet-like material feels great to the touch. The toy contains crinkly potato, sweet potato, and corn-shaped plushies inside so my dog shows even more interest 😊

There are multiple spots to hide treats so it's not just a one-time find-and-done kind of toy. She explores with her nose in different places and spends a long time extracting and eating the treats 🧠✨

It's helpful for keeping her entertained when she's alone and nosework play really helps her burn off energy. My pup loves playing with it so I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content:
아직 아기강쥐임! 간식대신 사료 넣고 줬는데두 환장함~~
앗 첨에는 약간 이게모지? 이러다가 냄새를 맡더니 코가 바빠짐.. 첨애는 잘 못뺐는데 지금은 적응해서 그냥 농부 저리가라임! 수확성공률100프로유 근데 한가지 우리 강쥐 애기라 옥수수랑 고구마 껍질을 잘 못벗김.. 벗기려고 노력은 하는디 노하우가 부족함. 이건 차차 애기가 알아서 터득하겄쥬~ 암틍 성공적인 노즈워크 감자밭이었어요 굳굳 베리굳
reviews.content_en:
Still just a baby puppy! I put kibble instead of treats and she went crazy for it~~
At first she was like 'what is this?' but then she caught the scent and her nose got busy.. she couldn't pull them out at first but now she's adapted and she's like 'move over farmer!'haha 100% successful harvest rate~ But one thing—since my puppy is still little, she can't peel off the corn and sweet potato shells.. she tries but doesn't have the technique yet. She'll figure it out as she grows~~ Anyway it was a successful nosework potato field! Good good very good 👍

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
솔직히 노즈워크 장난감 아무리 오래 논다 해도 울강아지는 2분컷 해버리는데 이건 모든 농작물에 간식 넣을수 있고 고구마랑 옥수수는 두배 더 넣을수 있어서  5분이상은 가지고 놀더라구요! 익숙해 지면 좀 더 빨리 끝날것 같지만 소리도 다양하게 나서 더 흥미있어 하는거 같아요~ 
아쉬운 점은 내가 사면 이벤트 하는 매직💫😭
+ 옥수수 하나가 좀 더리한게 묻어있어서 조곰 기분이 그렇습니다😞
reviews.content_en:
Honestly even when other nosework toys are supposed to last forever, my pup finishes them in 2 minutes, but with this one you can hide treats in every single crop and you can hide double in the sweet potato and corn so she plays with it for over 5 minutes! Once she gets the hang of it it might be faster but the different sounds make her more interested~ 
The only downside is I didn't get the magic event discount when I bought it 💫😭
+ One corn had some slightly sticky residue on it which was a bit disappointing 😞

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
워낙 믿고 사는 바잇미 노즈워크를 첫구매혜택으로 저렴하게 구매해서 너무 좋아요! 킁카킁카하면서 구황작물 농사 짓는 귤이 보면 너무 귀엽슴댜🫶🏻🫶🏻 진작사줄걸 그랬어요!!ㅋㅋㅋ

고구마랑 옥수수는 껍질에 한번 더숨길수 있는데 감자는 다른방식으로 낑겨주는거라 더 다양해서 좋아여 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME is such a trusted brand so I always buy it, and I got this nosework toy at a great first-order discount and I love it! My pup Gyul sniffs around going 'sniff sniff' playing farmer with the autumn harvest crops and it's so adorable🫶🏻🫶🏻 I wish I'd bought it sooner!!hehe

The sweet potato and corn have an extra hiding spot under the peel, but the potato is hidden a different way so there's more variety which I love~ hehe

reviews.name: 도****
reviews.content: 좋아요 좋아요 너무 좋아요 삑삑 소리나는 장난감 좋아하는데 9개 다 삑삑이 들어있고 고구마랑 옥수수는 바스락 소리도나고 노즈워크 놀이도 할 수 있고 너무 좋아요 껍질안에도 간식숨기고 고구마감자옥수수들고 간식숨기고 추천합니다 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: Love it, love it, love it so much! 🐕 My pup loves squeaky toys and all 9 pieces have squeakers in them. The sweet potato and corn pieces also make crinkly sounds, and we can do nose work games with it too - it's amazing! We can hide treats inside the shells and the pieces themselves, and my dog just plays with it endlessly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
포장을 열자마자 농작물 모양(감자, 옥수수 등)의 조각들이 튀어나와 있어서 귀여웠어요. 
크기도 너무 작지도 크지도 않은 적당한 사이즈에요

 좋은 점은
노즈워크 기능 
여러 농작물과 텃밭 컨셉이 너무 귀여움
적당한 난이도

아쉬운 점은 
털, 먼지, 음식 찌꺼기가 쉽게 끼고
귀엽긴 하지만 기능 대비 가격이 약간 높은 느낌
reviews.content_en:
So cute! The pieces shaped like crops (potatoes, corn, etc.) popped out as soon as I opened the packaging. The size is just right - not too small, not too big.

Pros:
- Nose work functionality
- The various crops and garden concept theme is super adorable
- Good difficulty level

Cons:
- Hair, dust, and food debris get stuck easily
- While it's cute, the price feels a bit high for what it does

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이정도로 좋아할줄은 몰랐어요~ 첫날엔 시간이 좀걸렸는데 이젠 점점 쉽게 찾아서 난이도를 높여 꽁꽁 숨겼는데 ㅎㅎ
생각보다 사이즈가 크네요 작은걸로 인지하고 주문했는데 
크기도 크고 퀼리티가 정말 좋아요!!!! 
노즈워크 고민이시라면 무조건 구입하세요~~~
reviews.content_en: I didn't expect to love it this much! 😄 It took a bit on the first day, but now my pup finds the treats pretty easily, so I've been hiding them deeper haha. The size is bigger than I thought - I ordered thinking it was small, but it's actually quite large and the quality is really great!!!! If you're considering nose work toys, just buy it~~~

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content: 집에 있을 때 산책 외에 강아지가 즐길 수 있는 걸 준비해 줘야겠다고 생각했어요. 예전에 다른 곳에서 비슷한 걸 출시했을 때 놀아본 적이 있어서 그런지 주자 마자 어떻게 해야 하는지 잘 알고 바로 입과 발을 이용해서 간식과 사료를 찾아 먹더라구요. 인형 안에도 간식을 숨길 수 있게 되어 있고 삑삑이도 들어 있어서 여러 방법으로 활용할 수 있을 것 같아요. 게다가 위생적이고 귀엽게 만들어져서 더 좋았어요.^^
reviews.content_en: I wanted to give my dog something fun to enjoy at home besides walks. Since we've played with similar toys before, he knew exactly what to do right away and started using his mouth and paws to find treats and kibble. You can hide treats inside the plush toys too, and there are squeakers included, so there are lots of ways to use it. Plus it's made hygienically and it's adorable - that's a bonus! ^^

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 퀄리티가 진짜 좋아요. 인형들도 귀엽고 밭도 탄탄해요. 첨에는 탐색하느라 밭 전체를 훝더니 하나씩 빼서 안에 숨겨놓은 간식을 잘 찾아요. 삑삑 소리도 나고 바스락 소리도 나서 아주 흥미있게 놀아요. 따로 감자나 고구마만 주고 놀아줘도 좋아해요.
reviews.content_en: The quality is really great! The plush toys are cute and the base mat is sturdy. At first he swept through the whole garden searching, but now he takes out the pieces one by one and finds the hidden treats well. It makes squeaky and crinkly sounds so he finds it really interesting. He even loves playing with just the potato or sweet potato separately.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 장난감이 너무 귀여워요. 품질도 좋아서 쉽게 망가지지 않을거 같아요. 요기조기 간식 숨길 공간도 많아서 저희 애기가 좋아해요.
reviews.content_en: The toys are so cute! The quality is good so it doesn't seem like it'll break easily. There are lots of places to hide treats throughout, and my baby loves it!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 이런류의 노즈워크는 너무 쉬워서 잘 안사주는데 난이도가 좀 높다는 리뷰를 보고 구매해봤거든요. 와 만들어주는 저도 너무 재미있어요. 사실 옥수수랑 고구마가 벗겨지는줄 몰랐던..(특히 전 고구마가 무라고 생각했어요^^;;,) 아이가 야무지게 고구마 껍질을 발굴해내서 이게 무슨 작물이지하고 다시 상세페이지를 보니까 고구마더라구요ㅋㅋ 디테일도 너무 유쾌하고 재미있어서 보는 재미가 있네요. 다 놀고나선 농작물 던지기 놀이까지... 최근들어 산 장난감중 만족도 제일 높습니다.
reviews.content_en: I usually don't buy this type of nose work toy because they're too easy, but I saw a review saying this one has a higher difficulty level so I gave it a try. And honestly, even I have fun setting it up! I didn't realize the corn and sweet potato pieces could be peeled... (I actually thought the sweet potato was something else haha). My pup skillfully excavated the sweet potato shell and I was like 'what crop is this?' and had to check the product page again - it was a sweet potato! 😂 The details are so charming and fun it's entertaining just to watch. And after playing through everything, we even play toss games with the crops... This is honestly the toy I'm most satisfied with buying recently.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
집에 혼자 남을때 세팅하고 나가는데 잘놀아줘요 ㅎㅎ

너무 귀여운데 자꾸 하나씩 어디 사라졌다가 나타나요 ㅋㅋㅋ
견주는 강아지들이 놀다가 치우는게 조금 귀찮지만 너무 귀엽고 애기가 잘놀아주니까 너무 좋아용 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I set it up when she's home alone and she plays with it well hehe. It's so cute but the pieces keep disappearing one by one and then showing up again 😂 It's a bit annoying for me to clean up after playtime, but it's so adorable and my pup loves playing with it so much that I'm really happy hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 퀄리티가 음청 좋네요. 바닥판?이 여간 탄탄하고 미끄럼방지도 잘되고용. 중간중간 자수가 앙증 맞아용~ 요런타입 장난감이 이미 있어서 댕댕이가 순삭하는지라 고민했눈데 요건 구멍이 깊이도 깊고 꽉맞게 들어가서 조꼼더 어려운거 같아요. 노즈워크들도 다양해서 시간도 좀더 오래걸리고 좋으네용. 쿠폰받아서 저렴하게 구입햇어요~ 역시 바잇미는 믿고구입합니당~
reviews.content_en: The quality is really nice! The base mat is quite sturdy, the anti-slip works well, and the stitching details are perfectly cute~ I already had this type of toy so I was worried whether my dog would demolish it quickly, but this one has deep holes that fit snugly so it seems a bit more challenging. And there are various nose work options so it takes longer to complete - great! Got a coupon and purchased it cheaply~ BITE ME is definitely trustworthy ♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
밖에 못나가는 날씨엔 집에선 놀게 해주려고 세일할때 득템했어요!ㅋ
이 농장 타이쿤은 좀 깊은편이더라고요;ㅋ
저희 두부가 치와와여서 얼굴이 다 들어가야 간식을 꺼내먹을 수 있겠더라구요😅
그래도 바스락+삑삑이 소리 나서 잘 놀고 먹기위해 열심히 하긴 하더라고요.
한단계 난이도를 올려 고구마,옥수수 껍질 안에도 넣고 해줘야겠어요. (쉬운거 밖에 못하는 아이라..;)
reviews.content_en: I grabbed this during a sale for indoor playtime on days when we can't go outside! 😄 This Farm Tycoon toy is pretty deep, you know. Since my Tofu is a Chihuahua, his whole face needs to fit inside to get the treats out 😅 Still, the crinkly and squeaky sounds keep him entertained and he tries hard to get the treats. I'm thinking I'll increase the difficulty next time by hiding treats inside the sweet potato and corn shells too. (Since he can only do the easy level...)
